content: Main is now judge-ready after focused hardening. Your E2E work is useful, but the open PR replaces too much of the base app for the current risk profile.

**Henry:** Reviewed and merged https://github.com/kunchenguid/org-bench/pull/516. Verified updated tests.html: all 5 tests passed, including edit/Enter/Tab/arrows/recalc/range delete/undo/insert/reload and relative formula copy/paste, with clean browser console errors.
